scripts.test: node --test crawler/__tests__/*.test.js oracle/__tests__/*.test.js jobs/__tests__/*.test.js lib/__tests__/*.test.js test/integration/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npx c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov node --test crawler/__tests__/*.test.js oracle/__tests__/*.test.js jobs/__tests__/*.test.js lib/__tests__/*.test.js test/integration/*.test.js
scripts.test:ci: npx c8 --check-coverage --lines 60 --functions 55 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov node --test crawler/__tests__/*.test.js oracle/__tests__/*.test.js jobs/__tests__/*.test.js lib/__tests__/*.test.js test/integration/*.test.js
